consent_confirmed.description: Whether the reference explicitly agreed to the recorded conversation.

relationship_context.description: How the reference came to know the founder, the working relationship (peer, manager, customer, advisor), team size, and what the work was.

strength_examples.description: Specific moments the reference described that illustrated a strength. Each item is a story-anchored example, not a trait label. Generic praise without an example does NOT belong here.

concern_examples.description: Specific moments illustrating concerns or growth areas. Empty if the reference offered none even after a polite re-ask.

would_work_with_again.description: How they answered when asked about working with the founder again. 'unclear' if you couldn't form a confident read.

would_work_with_again_reason.description: Their reasoning, in their words. Empty if they didn't elaborate.

reference_quality.description: High if they gave specific examples and were forthcoming; medium if mixed; low if generic and vague throughout.

what_was_not_said.description: Hesitations, refusals to specify, abrupt topic changes, or notable absences in the reference's answers — often the most useful signal. Empty if nothing notable.

your_overall_read.description: A 1-2 sentence honest read on the founder as an operator, anchored in what the reference described, in your own words.
